channel.title: Pionia Framework on Pionia
channel.description: Recent content in Pionia Framework on Pionia

item.title: API versioning in Moonlight
item.description: One switch per API version; register in environment/settings.ini.

item.title: Example Post
item.description: You can use blog posts for announcing product updates and features.

item.title: Introduction
item.description: Installation paths, bootstrap, first API call, and where to go next.

item.title: PHP basics for Pionia
item.description: Prerequisites for developers new to PHP who want to follow the DeskFlow tutorial.

item.title: Why Pionia?
item.description: Opinionated JSON APIs without controllers, models, or route files.

item.title: Glossary
item.description: Service, action, switch, envelope, and other Moonlight vocabulary.

item.title: API tutorial — Part 1
item.description: Create deskflow-api, explore the scaffold, add TaskService, and call task.list.

item.title: Pionia v3 — Release notes
item.description: What changed in Pionia v3: AppRealm, native HTTP stack, RoadRunner, production optimization, and the Moonlight async platform.

item.title: Upgrading from v2
item.description: For a feature overview before migrating, read Pionia v3 release notes.

item.title: Moonlight overview
item.description: One versioned endpoint, real HTTP semantics, and a consistent JSON envelope.
